verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: The Hour has come near, and the moon has split [in two].
verse.verse_2: And if they see a miracle, they turn away and say, "Passing magic."
verse.verse_3: And they denied and followed their inclinations. But for every matter is a [time of] settlement.
verse.verse_4: And there has already come to them of information that in which there is deterrence -
verse.verse_5: Extensive wisdom - but warning does not avail [them].
verse.verse_6: So leave them, [O Muhammad]. The Day the Caller calls to something forbidding,
verse.verse_7: Their eyes humbled, they will emerge from the graves as if they were locusts spreading,
verse.verse_8: Racing ahead toward the Caller. The disbelievers will say, "This is a difficult Day."
verse.verse_9: The people of Noah denied before them, and they denied Our servant and said, "A madman," and he was repelled.
verse.verse_10: So he invoked his Lord, "Indeed, I am overpowered, so help."
verse.verse_11: Then We opened the gates of the heaven with rain pouring down
verse.verse_12: And caused the earth to burst with springs, and the waters met for a matter already predestined.
verse.verse_13: And We carried him on a [construction of] planks and nails,
verse.verse_14: Sailing under Our observation as reward for he who had been denied.
verse.verse_15: And We left it as a sign, so is there any who will remember?
verse.verse_16: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.
verse.verse_17: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
verse.verse_18: 'Aad denied; and how [severe] were My punishment and warning.
verse.verse_19: Indeed, We sent upon them a screaming wind on a day of continuous misfortune,
verse.verse_20: Extracting the people as if they were trunks of palm trees uprooted.
verse.verse_21: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.
verse.verse_22: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
verse.verse_24: And said, "Is it one human being among us that we should follow? Indeed, we would then be in error and madness.
verse.verse_25: Has the message been sent down upon him from among us? Rather, he is an insolent liar."
verse.verse_26: They will know tomorrow who is the insolent liar.
verse.verse_27: Indeed, We are sending the she-camel as trial for them, so watch them and be patient.
verse.verse_28: And inform them that the water is shared between them, each [day of] drink attended [by turn].
verse.verse_29: But they called their companion, and he dared and hamstrung [her].
verse.verse_30: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.
verse.verse_31: Indeed, We sent upon them one blast from the sky, and they became like the dry twig fragments of an [animal] pen.
verse.verse_32: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
verse.verse_33: The people of Lot denied the warning.
verse.verse_34: Indeed, We sent upon them a storm of stones, except the family of Lot - We saved them before dawn
verse.verse_35: As favor from us. Thus do We reward he who is grateful.
verse.verse_36: And he had already warned them of Our assault, but they disputed the warning.
verse.verse_37: And they had demanded from him his guests, but We obliterated their eyes, [saying], "Taste My punishment and warning."
verse.verse_38: And there came upon them by morning an abiding punishment.
verse.verse_39: So taste My punishment and warning.
verse.verse_40: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
verse.verse_41: And there certainly came to the people of Pharaoh warning.
verse.verse_42: They denied Our signs, all of them, so We seized them with a seizure of one Exalted in Might and Perfect in Ability.
verse.verse_43: Are your disbelievers better than those [former ones], or have you immunity in the scripture?
verse.verse_44: Or do they say, "We are an assembly supporting [each other]"?
verse.verse_45: [Their] assembly will be defeated, and they will turn their backs [in retreat].
verse.verse_46: But the Hour is their appointment [for due punishment], and the Hour is more disastrous and more bitter.
verse.verse_47: Indeed, the criminals are in error and madness.
verse.verse_48: The Day they are dragged into the Fire on their faces [it will be said], "Taste the touch of Saqar."
verse.verse_49: Indeed, all things We created with predestination.
verse.verse_50: And Our command is but one, like a glance of the eye.
verse.verse_51: And We have already destroyed your kinds, so is there any who will remember?
verse.verse_52: And everything they did is in written records.
verse.verse_53: And every small and great [thing] is inscribed.
verse.verse_54: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and rivers,
verse.verse_55: In a seat of honor near a Sovereign, Perfect in Ability.
